backend/src/main/java/com/cqlplatform/Cq.general_idea: Enable Spring asynchronous method execution support.
Enable Spring scheduled task execution support.

backend/src/main/java/com/cqlplatform/co.general_idea: Configure FhirContext with Apache HTTP client factory and externalized connection pool/timeout settings.
Disable writing dates as timestamps in ObjectMapper to ensure ISO-8601 string serialization.
Refactor cache manager to use SimpleCacheManager with explicitly named Caffeine caches for different domains.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
backend/src/main/java/com/cqlplatform/co.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist' on JDK 17+ with Spring Boot 3.

backend/src/main/java/com/cqlplatform/co.general_idea: Refactor CORS configuration from WebMvcConfigurer addCorsMappings to a dedicated CorsFilter bean for more granular control and header management.
Add a custom filter to support Access-Control-Allow-Private-Network headers for local development environments.
Update allowed origins list to include sandbox.cds-hooks.org and localhost variations.
Refactor imports to use wildcard for model classes and add logging/security dependencies.
Add Slf4j annotation to enable logging in the controller.
Update discovery endpoint to return only shared services and adjust path mapping.
Add logging and error handling to the invoke service endpoint.
Implement feedback submission with proper request body and error handling.
Add new sandbox invocation endpoint for testing CDS services.
Add per-user discovery endpoint with API key authentication.
Add per-user hook invocation endpoint with API key authentication.
Refactor imports to use wildcard syntax and add new dependencies for security and HTTP status handling.
Inject new service dependencies for bulk export, validation, VSAC, and optional implementation guide support.
Add endpoints to browse and retrieve Implementation Guide packages, profiles, value sets, and code systems.
Add endpoints for viewing cache statistics and evicting specific caches.
Add endpoints to initiate bulk data exports and poll their status, including input validation.
Add endpoint to execute FHIR batch or transaction bundles.

    public ResponseEntity<String> executeTransaction(...) { ... }

backend/src/main/java/com/cqlplatform/co.general_idea: Add endpoints to search, retrieve, and expand ValueSets from the VSAC service.
Add input validation checks to the existing resource search endpoint to prevent invalid requests.
Add input validation checks to the existing resource retrieval endpoint to prevent invalid requests.
Enhance ValueSet expansion to automatically route VSAC URLs to the dedicated VSAC service with fallback logic.
Add endpoint to search for codes within a code system by text.

backend/src/main/java/com/cqlplatform/ex.general_idea: Add import for Resilience4j CallNotPermittedException to support circuit breaker exception handling.
Add exception handler for FhirServerUnavailableException to return a structured 503 response.
Add exception handler for CallNotPermittedException to return a structured 503 response when circuit breaker is open.

backend/src/main/java/com/cqlplatform/mo.general_idea: Add ownerUsername field to CqlLibrary model to track library ownership.
Add sharedWith field to CqlLibrary model to track users with shared access.
Add accessLevel field to CqlLibrary model to define access permissions.
Add a version field to the CdsServiceDefinition model to support versioning of CDS services.
Add a new field to store error messages in the measure evaluation result.
